name: hermod
description: Local marketplace shipped with the Hermod repository. Lets `claude plugin install hermod@hermod` resolve from a local checkout (or a git remote) without going through a published registry. The same manifest works once the repo is mirrored to a marketplace host.

plugins.name: hermod
plugins.description: Cryptographically verifiable agent-to-agent messaging for Claude Code: slash commands (/agents /peers /inbox /health), the `hermod` skill, and the MCP server registration that bridges inbox events into Claude Code notifications/claude/channel blocks.
